title: [FIRRTL] infer width constant
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp34: UInt<25>
    tmp34 <= UInt(26750160)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 25 is not greater than or equal to source width 32
    tmp34 <= UInt(26750160)
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp34, %c26750160_ui32) : (!firrtl.uint<25>, !firrtl.uint<32>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [24:0] tmp34
);
  assign tmp34 = 25'h1982cd0;
endmodule
```
